task_completion.description: Verify successful login to OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule interface is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to Dr. Sarah Chen's schedule for today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule view is open and explicitly shows 'Sarah Chen' or provider number '999998' for the current day.

task_completion.description: Verify the 09:00 appointment is marked as Cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 09:00 appointment slot for Dr. Sarah Chen shows a 'C' status code, a 'Cancelled' label, or the appointment details window shows the status set to 'Cancelled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 09:30 appointment is marked as Cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 09:30 appointment slot for Dr. Sarah Chen shows a 'C' status code, a 'Cancelled' label, or the appointment details window shows the status set to 'Cancelled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 10:00 appointment is marked as Cancelled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 10:00 appointment slot for Dr. Sarah Chen shows a 'C' status code, a 'Cancelled' label, or the appointment details window shows the status set to 'Cancelled'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) is open displaying the OSCAR EMR web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to update the appointments.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database clients (like mysql) are open showing UPDATE statements for the appointment table.

integrity.description: Verify the status changes are made within the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual OSCAR EMR UI (menus, appointment blocks, status dropdowns) rather than a text editor or developer console manipulating the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Provider Name: Sarah Chen (Provider No: 999998). Expected cancellations: exactly 3 appointments at 09:00, 09:30, and 10:00. The appointments must be marked with Status Code 'C' (Cancelled). Login credentials are oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117.
